data.name: SEX VIKING ISLAND
data.detailed_description:
You arrive on a Viking island that is in a state of war between different tribes. 
You need to bring peace and in return you will get a lot of hot sex.

In the game you will find:

- One-handed play

- Sex stories with videos and pictures

- Three hot Viking women

- Achievements that are easy to unlock

- Minimal boring scenes


Get aboard the ship!

An exciting sexual adventure to the Viking Island awaits you.

data.short_description: SEX VIKING ISLAND is a visual novel where you will be playing a male character. In the game there will be a lot of hot sex scenes and beautiful women.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 651 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 651 MB 可用空間
